description: Numerical orbit propagator with full force model: geopotential (EGM-96), atmospheric drag (Harris-Priester/HASDM), SRP (conical shadow), and Sun/Moon third-body perturbations. Outputs CCSDS OEM via spacedatastandards.org FlatBuffers.

nonGravitational.drag: Atmospheric drag with Harris-Priester density model, F10.7 parameterization, DCA hook for HASDM
nonGravitational.srp: Solar radiation pressure (cannonball model) with conical Earth shadow (penumbra/umbra)

thirdBody.sun: Solar gravitational perturbation (Battin formulation, low-precision ephemeris)
thirdBody.moon: Lunar gravitational perturbation (Battin formulation, low-precision ephemeris)
